  path={"/api/meshobjects/meshusers/samira-johnson"}
  context={"endpoint"}

Update a specific meshUser

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API Key authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshuser.v2.hal+json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","title":"api-meshobjects-meshpaymentmethods486549215"},"examples":{"meshUserV2Put":{"value":"{\n  \"apiVersion\": \"v2\",\n  \"kind\": \"meshUser\",\n  \"metadata\": {\n    \"name\": \"samira-johnson\"\n  },\n  \"spec\": {\n    \"email\": \"sjohnson@example.com\",\n    \"euid\": \"fa087d29-d287-46b9-9b95-d03a68862fb6\",\n    \"firstName\": \"Samira\",\n    \"lastName\": \"Johnson\",\n    \"tags\": {}\n  }\n}"}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"200","content":{"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshuser.v2.hal+json":{"schema":{"title":"meshUserV2Put","type":"object"},"examples":{"meshUserV2Put":{"value":"{\n  \"kind\" : \"meshUser\",\n  \"apiVersion\" : \"v2\",\n  \"metadata\" : {\n    \"name\" : \"samira-johnson\"\n  },\n  \"spec\" : {\n    \"email\" : \"sjohnson@example.com\",\n    \"firstName\" : \"Samira\",\n    \"lastName\" : \"Johnson\",\n    \"euid\" : \"fa087d29-d287-46b9-9b95-d03a68862fb6\",\n    \"tags\" : {\n      \"environment\" : [ \"dev\", \"test\", \"qa\" ]\n    }\n  },\n  \"_links\" : {\n    \"self\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshusers/samira-johnson\"\n    },\n    \"meshworkspaceusergroups\" : {\n      \"href\" : \"https://mesh-backend-url/api/meshobjects/meshworkspaceusergroups?username=samira-johnson\"\n    }\n  }\n}"}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
